# daytona_admin_set_snapshot_general_status (Action)

Sets Daytona snapshot general status through the Daytona admin API. This action requires Daytona admin privileges.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `general` (Boolean) Whether the snapshot should be marked as general.
- `snapshot_id` (String) Daytona snapshot ID.
